evals.expected_output: Open bug triage for Android 16KB page size. Should classify as type/bug, area/libSkiaSharp.native, os/Android. Should suggest needs-investigation with suggestedReproPlatform linux (Android issues use linux). Should find related PR or duplicate #3419.
expectations: Produces a valid JSON file at output/ai/repos/mono-SkiaSharp/ai-triage/3420.json
analysis.codeInvestigation has at least one entry
output.actionability.suggestedAction is one of the valid enum values
output.actions array is non-empty and contains an update-labels action

evals.expected_output: Feature request triage for Gray16 support. Should classify as type/feature-request, area/SkiaSharp. Should note this depends on upstream Skia adding Gray16 to SkColorType. suggestedAction should be keep-open or needs-investigation.
expectations: Produces a valid JSON file at output/ai/repos/mono-SkiaSharp/ai-triage/3385.json
analysis.codeInvestigation has at least one entry examining SKColorType or color type enums
analysis.summary or analysis.rationale mentions upstream Skia dependency
output.actions array contains an update-labels action

evals.expected_output: Bug triage for XPS vs PDF image scaling discrepancy. Should classify as type/bug, area/SkiaSharp, with backends including backend/XPS and/or backend/PDF. Should find the DPI/scaling code path in SKDocument. suggestedReproPlatform should be windows (XPS is Windows-only).
expectations: Produces a valid JSON file at output/ai/repos/mono-SkiaSharp/ai-triage/3400.json
analysis.codeInvestigation has at least one entry examining SKDocument or XPS code

evals.expected_output: Duplicate detection. Issue #3419 is a duplicate of #3420 (same Android 16KB page size bug). Should classify as type/bug and suggestedAction should be close-duplicate referencing #3420.
expectations: Produces a valid JSON file at output/ai/repos/mono-SkiaSharp/ai-triage/3419.json
analysis.summary or analysis.rationale references #3420 as the original issue
output.actions array contains an action referencing issue #3420

evals.expected_output: Already-fixed bug triage. Issue #3391 (Blazor font typefaces) is closed/completed. Should classify as type/bug, area/SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor, os/WASM. suggestedAction should reflect the issue is already resolved (close-fixed or close-answered).
expectations: Produces a valid JSON file at output/ai/repos/mono-SkiaSharp/ai-triage/3391.json
output.actionability.suggestedAction reflects the issue is already resolved
analysis.codeInvestigation has at least one entry
evidence.fixStatus is present since the issue is already fixed/closed
